title: Quantum Lab Wiring: Shielded Spool Placement
strategies: bottom-row baseline: N equal pads in the clear bottom margin (reproduces the checker baseline, F=S/2)
coarse largest-empty-circle greedy: place each pad in turn at the grid candidate with the largest feasible radius, respecting walls, zones and prior pads
fine largest-empty-circle greedy plus a hex-lattice equal-radius packing that drops zone-colliding sites, taking whichever total is larger
boundary-aware unequal packing: exploit the clear outer margin with big corner/edge pads and fill interstices around the forbidden zones
